reviews.comment:
Aparte de la estacion de servicio hay un espacio bien cuidado para descansar, con mesas y asientos de cemento. Ideal para estirar las piernas y despejarte un poco.

(Translated by Google)
Besides the gas station, there's a well-maintained rest area with cement tables and benches. Ideal for stretching your legs and clearing your head.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRN0pxTE9REAE

reviews.comment:
Limpio y con muy poca gente, los mejores sandwiches de pan francés de la ruta de Córdoba a Buenos Aires

(Translated by Google)
Clean and with very few people, the best French bread sandwiches on the route from Córdoba to Buenos Aires

reviews.comment:

Excellent service, the sandwiches they make are amazing.

reviews.comment:
Siempre tienen combustible. Ideal para los q usan autopista rosario cordoba. Nunca hay mucha demora

(Translated by Google)
They always have fuel. Ideal for those using the Rosario-Cordoba highway. There are never long delays.

Good overall service, clean bathrooms.

reviews.comment:
Excelente atencion, tiene un hermoso parque para quedarse con mesas y sillas. Riquisima ensalada de frutas. Y alimentan a 3 perros de la calle que estan muy bien.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. It has a beautiful park with tables and chairs. The fruit salad is delicious. And they feed three stray dogs, who are doing very well.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3NXB2ZTR3RRAB
